entry.title: Creating a CBO with CRUD operations | SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Introduction
Creating a Custom Business Object (CBO) in Public Cloud, from the initial setup to enabling CRUD operations. This includes communication scenario, arrangement, and catalog association. A simple process to enable customizations in the environment.


Step 1 - Creating the CBO (Custom Business Object)
Access the Custom Business Object app.



Create a new CBO.

 

 

 


To enable future CRUD access, select this option.
Add the required fields, define data types and keys, then click Publish.


Step 2 - Creating the Communication Scenario
Access the Custom Communication Scenarios app.


Create a new Communication Scenario.

 

 




Define a name and description.

Save and publish.





Step 3 - Creating the Communication Arrangement
Access the Communication Arrangements app.



Create a new Communication Arrangement.

 

 




Associate it with the previously created Communication Scenario.



Select the Communication System (e.g., ZLOCAL, already pointing to the environment).

 

 




Publish.


Step 4 - Linking Communications to the CBO
Open the previously created CBO.
In the Inbound Services tab, add the created service.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 



The Communication Arrangement is now associated.

 



Step 5 - Assigning the CBO to a Business Catalog
Access the Custom Catalog Extensions app. 



Locate the two objects that need to be linked to a Business Catalog (IBS and SCBO).

 






 

 



 

 




Publish.


Step 6 - Accessing the CBO CRUD (SM30 Equivalent)
1- Accessing through the CBO. Click in Go To Generated UI

 



2- Searching via apps.

 



Step 7 - Result
Click in Create to create a record.

entry.title: Releasing "requests" | In-App Mode (Custom Objects) | SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Introduction

In Public Cloud, the customization transport process differs from Private Cloud (STMS). The request is now called Software Collection. When transporting objects in In-App mode, each modification generates a new version within the Software Collection. You can add only the modified items, include comments, and use filters to streamline the search process. After importing the collection into the Test environment, performing the Forward action is necessary to make it available for import into PRD.

Step 1
Access the Export Software Collection app.



Create a Software Collection (if one does not already exist for the relevant topic or module/organization in the environment).


Name your Software Collection and click Create.

Once the Software Collection is created, note that it is versioned. This means that with every object modification and transport, a new version is automatically created for transport.




In Add Items, you can select the objects to be included in this Collection for transport.

 

 

 


Support Filters are available to assist with object searches within the environment.



After adding the desired objects, click Check to verify if there are any blockers, dependencies, or inconsistencies for transport.

Check Option
Note: It is possible to transport only the modified items or all items again. The first option is always recommended.



A log is generated at the end, displaying the transport status.


 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Export Option – This is where the release (Export) to the Test environment actually takes place.

 

A comment can be added for each versioned transport.



A log is generated at the end, displaying the transport status.

 

 

 

 

 




Step 2
After exporting, log in to the Test environment and access the Import Collection app.


Use the available filters to search for the desired collection. Upon reaching the Test environment, the versioned collection will have the status "Ready for Import."

 

 

 

 

 


Select the desired versioned collection and choose Check and Import.

 

 

 

 

 



Add a transport comment.



Click Manual Import.

The import process starts, and the collection status changes to "Importing" during processing.


Once the import is complete, a confirmation message is displayed:


Step 3
The collection has only been imported into the Test environment but is not yet available for import into the Production environment. To make it available for import into PRD, it is necessary to perform the Forward action.

 

 

 

 



Select the collection and click Forward.




The collection is forwarded to the Production environment transport path.

 

 

 

 

 


To finalize, log in to the Production environment and access the Import Collection app.




Select the desired collection and import it.



The collection has been successfully imported into the PRD environment.

entry.title: Transportando "requests" | Modo In-app | SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Introdução

Em Public Cloud, o processo de transporte de customizações é diferente de como fazemos em Private Cloud (STMS). A antiga request agora é chamada de Software Collection. Ao transportar objetos no modo In-App, cada modificação gera uma nova versão dentro de uma Software Collection. É possível adicionar apenas os itens modificados, incluir comentários e usar filtros para facilitar a busca. Após importar a Collection para o ambiente de Test, é necessário executar a ação Forward para disponibilizá-la para importação no PRD.


Passo 1
Acessar app Export Software Collection



Criar uma Software Collection (caso ainda não tenha referente ao tema ou como foi modularizado/organizado no ambiente)


Nomear sua Software Collection e clicar em Create

Software Collection criada. Repare que ela é versionada, ou seja, a cada mudança de objeto e transporte, a mesma cria uma nova versão para transporte


Em Add Items, podemos adicionar os objetos que queremos incluir nessa Collection para transporte



 

 

 

Filtros disponibilizados de apoio para pesquisa no ambiente



Após inserir os objetos desejados, podemos clicar em Check para verificar se há algum impeditivo, dependência ou inconsistência para transporte.

Opção Check
OBS: Temos a opção de transportar somente o que foi alterado, ou todos os itens novamente. Recomenda-se sempre a primeira opção



Ao final é gerado uma log com o status do transporte



 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Opção Export – É onde de fato acontece a liberação (Export) para o ambiente de Test

OBS: Temos a opção de transportar somente o que foi alterado, ou todos os itens novamente. Recomenda-se sempre a primeira opção.


Podemos inserir um comentário referente ao transporte a cada versionamento

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 


Ao final é gerado uma log com o status do transporte

 

 

 

 

 

 


Passo 2
Após exportado, logar no ambiente de Test, e acessar app Import Collection


Podemos pesquisar pelos seguintes filtros. Ao chegar no ambiente de Test, a collection do versionamento em questão estará com o status “Ready for Import”

 

 

 

 

 

 

Selecionar a collection do versionamento desejado e selecionar a opção Check and Import

 

 

 

 



Adicionar comentário de transporte


Clicar em Manual Import



Importação iniciada:



O status da collection mudará para Importing durante o processamento:

Ao finalizar, a mensagem

 

Passo 3
Com isso, a collection foi apenas importada para o ambiente de Test, mas não necessariamente disponibilizada para a importação ao ambiente Produtivo. Para disponibilizarmos a ser importada a PRD, precisamos fazer o Forward dela:



 

 

 

 

 

Selecionar collection e clicar em Forward


Collection encaminhada à trilha do ambiente produtivo



 

 

 

 

Para finalizar, logar em ambiente produtivo e acessar app Import Collection


  

Selecionar a collection que deseja importar



Collection importada em PRD

entry.title: 集锦帖：台湾地区常见本地化需求在SAP ERP公有云中的实施方式建议
entry.content:
SAP ERP公有云解决方案针对台湾地区提供了许多本地化功能，例如符合当地法规的财务报表、税务申报、电子发票管理、数据合规处理等，完整信息可参考 S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition中针对台湾的本地化功能。

过去几年中，许多用户和实施商在应用该系统后给予SAP大量有益反馈。本文将聚焦其中几个重要话题，通过架构师的见解，为台湾地区的SAP应用生态圈的客户和实施伙伴提供参考，帮助企业更好地利用SAP ERP云系统推动数字化管理。

 

基于利润中心的成本核算

利润中心评估是企业财务管理中不可或缺的一部分，专注于评估各业务单位或部门的财务表现。通过将收入和成本归集到特定的利润中心，企业能够分析盈利能力、促进问责制及支持战略决策制定。目前，SAP ERP公有云暂不支持此类业务需求，参考：3371144 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 系统中不支持利润中心评估、Profit Center Valuation | SAP Customer Influence Portal。建议企业在前期沟通中了解SAP产品现状及设计理念，并根据咨询商的业务优化建议调整企业管理方式，运用SAP提供的最佳实践。

 

外劳采购的税代扣代缴与申报

在中国台湾，通过外劳的采购来支持企业内外需求相当常见。当地法规要求企业为这类采购进行税代扣代缴，具体可参考：Comprehensive Overview of Withholding Tax in Taiwan。目前，SAP ERP公有云尚未提供全面的本地化解决方案，但可了解架构师提供的变通应用方案：SAP ERP公有云台湾本地化-代扣税实施建议。

若贵司或您的企业客户有类似需求，欢迎通过企业S-User账户登录以下页面，投下您宝贵的一票，以助SAP产品部门更好地规划相关功能的实现：Withholding Tax Request | SAP Customer Influence Portal。

 

台湾统一发票管理及VAT申报

根据台湾地区相关法规，目前（2025年）有效的统一发票形式共有五种。SAP ERP公有云提供了电子发票的标准端到端解决方案。关于统一发票在SAP ERP公有云中的管理建议、方案应用注意事项、及与加值中心集成申报VAT的实施方式建议，请参阅：台湾地区统一发票在 SAP ERP 公有云系统中的实施方案建议。

 

LCM报表

LCM报表是依据IFRS准则下LCNRV（成本与可变现净值孰低法，参考 IAS 2 Inventories ）库存估值方法的财务报表。根据台湾法规，已上市或准备IPO的企业需要定期披露LCM报表。目前，SAP ERP公有云中的库存估值标准APP尚未支持LCNRV方法，企业需定制报表以满足相关法规需求。如需此功能，请在以下页面投票：Inventory Valuation Enhancement for IFRS Compliance with LCNRV Method | SAP Customer Influence Portal。

 

库龄表

台湾上市企业需通过ERP系统的库龄表有效管理库存资产，确保合规及财务报表的准确性，改善资产流动性，减少损失，提高竞争力。SAP ERP公有云目前提供标准应用 "库存KPI分析" 供企业分析库存指标。企业或SAP实施伙伴亦可通过定制化报表满足深度定制库龄表的需求。更多相关博客可在 SAP Community 查询。

entry.title: Exciting Opportunity for SAP Partners: Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative - Cycle 1, 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP Partners,

We're thrilled to announce that the first cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative for 2025 is still open for your registrations! This is a unique opportunity for you to collaborate with SAP and help shape the future of our products. This is your chance to make a real impact and contribute valuable insights to the development of SAP's upcoming products, features, and applications. Don't miss out – register by March 28, 2025, to join the current projects open to SAP partners. We look forward to hearing your perspectives and ideas on the following initiatives:

ABAP

  • ABAP Cloud Development Assistant
  • OData UI Service from scratch Generator

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Create AI-driven extensions and automations with SAP Build
  • SAP BPM, SAP BRM and SAP Process Orchestration migration to Cloud
  • SAP BTP Cockpit, Cloud Foundry UIs
  • SAP BTP Usability Event - User research project
  • SAP Integration Suite

SAP Customer Experience

  • SAP CX AI Toolkit

Data & Analytics

  • SAP HANA Cloud Elastic Compute Node
  • SAP HANA Database Migration to SAP HANA Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Fiori First for Sales Order Management
  • Identifying and resolving critical situations in a production planners day in S/4HANA Public Cloud
  • Identity and Access Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Insights into Business processes with Business Event Logging
  • New Financial Reporting for Enterprise Project (Project Booklet) including ETO
  • Planned New Solution for Cost Component Breakdown
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Product Change Management
  • Simplification of transports in SAP S/4HANA® Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape

SAP Globalization

  • Australia and New Zealand: GST requirement for Down payments
  • Australia: Modified Payment Times Report - AASB 8 and Taxable Payments Annual Report

Lifecycle Management

  • DevOps with ABAP

Others

  • SAP Reference Architecture in SAP LeanIX
  • Shape the future of SAP Cloud ALM Configuration & Security Analysis

We believe collaboration is at the heart of innovation. By working together with our customers and partners, we can reshape the future of SAP products and transform the way businesses operate.

Don't wait – register today on influence.sap.com and join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 1 in 2025!

Warm regards,

Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud V2 & S/4HANA: Streamlining Opportunity Management & Order Fulfillment
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP offers a robust suite of tools to streamline sales and service operations. From upselling and lead management to automated order processing and post-delivery service management, SAP provides an end-to-end solution that enhances efficiency and customer satisfaction. This blog explores key features and integrations that drive seamless business processes.

A Short Story: Transforming Sales with SAP

John, a sales manager at TechSolutions Inc., faced challenges in managing leads, generating accurate quotations, and ensuring timely order fulfillment. His team often struggled with manual data entry, delayed pricing approvals, and service inefficiencies.

After implementing SAP’s Sales and Service Cloud integrated with S/4HANA, John’s team saw a transformation. AI-driven Opportunity Scores helped them focus on high-potential deals, while Product Recommendations streamlined upselling. Automated Quotation Management with Price Simulation and ATP Check reduced errors and improved customer confidence. Once an order was placed, S/4HANA Solution Orders ensured seamless coordination between products and services. Automated Delivery and Billing accelerated order processing, and post-sales support was effortlessly handled through S/4HANA Service Orders.

With SAP, John’s team increased sales efficiency, reduced turnaround times, and enhanced customer satisfaction. Now, they can focus on growing the business instead of handling repetitive tasks.

Upselling and Lead/Opportunity Creation

1. Opportunity Score, Playbook & Opportunity Summary

SAP Sales and Service Cloud leverages AI-driven Opportunity Scores to help sales teams prioritize deals. The Playbook feature offers guided selling strategies, ensuring best practices are followed. The Opportunity Summary consolidates crucial insights, enabling data-driven decision-making.

 

Quotation and Order Creation

1. Quotation + Price Simulation + ATP Check

SAP facilitates accurate Quotation Management by incorporating Price Simulation and Available-to-Promise (ATP) Check. These features help validate pricing strategies and ensure product availability before finalizing a sale.

 

 

2. S/4HANA Solution Order

S/4HANA Solution Order enables businesses to combine products and services into a single transaction, offering a unified and flexible sales approach. This ensures seamless coordination between different sales components.

3. S/4HANA Sales Order

A Sales Order in S/4HANA ensures accurate order processing, tax calculations, and stock validation in real time. This reduces manual intervention and accelerates order fulfillment.

4. S/4HC - Automated Delivery and Billing

With SAP S/4HANA Cloud (S/4HC), businesses can automate delivery and billing, ensuring timely invoicing and seamless logistics operations. This automation minimizes errors and enhances the customer experience.

 

Key Benefits of SAP's Integrated Sales and Service Solutions

  • ✔ Real-Time Insights – AI-driven analytics and scoring improve decision-making.
  • ✔ Automation & Efficiency – Automated workflows reduce manual errors and accelerate processes.
  • ✔ Seamless Integration – End-to-end integration between sales, delivery, and service ensures continuity.
  • ✔ Enhanced Customer Experience – Proactive engagement and personalized recommendations drive satisfaction.

Conclusion

SAP’s comprehensive ecosystem enhances sales performance, order processing, and service management through automation, AI-driven insights, and seamless integrations. By leveraging these advanced capabilities, businesses can boost revenue, streamline operations, and deliver a superior customer experience.

Embrace SAP’s intelligent sales and service solutions today and stay ahead in the digital transformation journey!

entry.title: 2502重要更新：权限细化至App级别
entry.content:
在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition版本中，权限划分的最小颗粒度一直以来是到业务目录（Business Catalog）级别。也就是说，我们只能选择分配业务目录给相应的用户。但如果想分配一个业务目录下的部分应用给用户，这一直以来是做不到的。不过，在2502版本的更新中，这一痛点得到了解决。我们可以细分哪些应用用户可以访问，哪些应用不希望用户访问。下面，我将通过一个实例，一步一步地详细讲解这个功能是如何在系统里实现的：

 

场景介绍：

假设用户小A，她的日常工作需要查询处理销售订单，可能会更改销售订单。因此，我给她分配的业务角色包含了以下业务目录：

 

用户有以下这些应用的访问权限。但是，我不希望用户有创建销售订单的权限（方框选中的Apps）。

那么我该如何做呢？

 

系统实现：

使用系统管理员登录，选择“维护业务角色”，选择分配给该用户的业务角色Z_CUSTOM_SALES_PROCESSING：

 

点击“IAM应用程序”页签，并点“编辑”按钮。在这里，你就能选择用户可以访问哪些应用，不能访问哪些应用。默认，你能看到“活动”字段都是选中的，也就是默认用户都能访问这些应用：

 

选中不希望用户访问的应用“管理销售订单”，“管理销售订单（版本 2）”，“创建销售订单”，“创建销售凭证”；然后点击“取消激活”，然后保存。系统会自动更新并激活新的权限。

 

我们刷新一下用户小A的界面，惊喜地发现，那些创建销售订单的应用已经不见了。我们分配了希望分配的权限给到我们的用户小A！

 

另外，当小A去查找相关的应用时，也只能找到她能访问的应用。那些创建销售订单的应用，她也是搜不到的：

 

小结和提示：

  • 权限划分，从2502开始，已经能到应用级别。
  • 应用级别的权限划分，是在业务角色下更改的，并不是直接更改业务目录。
  • 另外，推荐大家可以读一下产品经理Christian关于这一功能的介绍：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502: Flexible Bu... - SAP Community
  • 和我们的产品专家George对于这一新功能的详尽描述：Precise Control of Fiori App Access with the App A... - SAP Community

 

对于这一功能，如您有任何疑问和建议，可直接留言回复，谢谢！

entry.title: EPPM项目成本报表-计划/实际
entry.content:
业务需求

本博文介绍EPPM中APP：项目成本报表-计划/实际的端到端业务应用

系统实现

1.创建收入项目并且将项目处理状态设置成已审批

2.导入项目计划成本，APP：导入财务计划数据

下载模版并维护然后导入：

注意：导入成本计划是否支持本地货币而不仅仅选择全球货币USD呢？

3.打开APP:项目成本报表-计划/实际

可以通过报表查看导入后的项目计划成本：

4.创建项目需求，APP：管理项目需求，点击物料页签然后点击创建

字段：含预留打勾

记录预留和采购申请号码

5.打开项目成本报表-计划/实际，可以在字段：承诺查看到基于项目创建的采购申请需求值

6.将采购申请转换成采购订单，并且收货

7.打开项目成本报表-计划/实际，可以在字段：项目库存成本中查看基于项目的库存成本值

注意：项目库存成本目前只有全球货币计，并没有本地项目货币，产品还需增强

8.发货预留，APP：过账发货

9.打开项目成本报表-计划/实际，查看项目实际成本

感谢观看

entry.title: Advanced Intercompany Sales MTO and Variant Configuration (7DM)
entry.content:
This blog will delve into the Advanced Intercompany Sales MTO and Variant Configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, scope item 7DM, revealing best practice processes and key configuration information.

This scope item enables Make-to-Order Production with Advanced Variant Configuration in advanced intercompany sales. It partially combines those functions and requires the following scope items as business conditions:

IYT - Make-to-Order Production with Variant Configuration

BJE - Make-to-Order Production - Finished Goods Sales and Final Assembly

5D2 - Advanced Intercompany Sales

We can also name it as 5D2+MTO+AVC in short to disdinguish between difference scenario combinations.

Index

Business Process Overview

CBC Business Configuration

Business Partner Master Data configuration

Product Master Data configuration

Business Process Overview

In our show case, the direction is opposite to that in the best proactice scopt item 7DM. US company (e.g. company code 1710) sells goods to customer, and the goods are delivered from a plant, which belongs to DE company (e.g. company code 1110).

1.     Create Sales Order with Configurable Material (Single Level)

In APP Manage Sales Orders (F1873) , once the plant 1010 is entered in item 10, this sales order is considered as advanced intercompany sales.

Please note the combination of OR+CBTC and transit plant 1710 need to be attached when

Usually, the variant configuration screen will pop up and you have all the options to select.

 

After saving, you can find the external customer sales order 54310 appear in APP Monitor Value Chains (F4854) . Expand the sales order by clicking the arrow, we can see the intercompany sales order and purchae order has been created automatically.

 

 

 

2.     Manufacturing Steps Production Order Processing

There is no stock for SO 54310 if we check the stock report. To produce the material and get it into Sales Order stock, let’s execute the following manufacturing steps.

2.1  Material Requirements Planning for Sales Order

Find the SO in APP Monitor Material Coverage - Net / Individual Segments (F2101A) and open the manage material coverage view, click Start MRP Run. Planned order 4000002295 is created.

 

2.2  Create Production Order

After converting, production order 1005703 has been created.

 

2.3  Release Production Orders

APP Manage Production Orders (F2336)

 

2.4  Pick Components (Picking List)

APP Pick Components for Production Orders (CO27) to post the picking list

 

2.5  Confirm Assembly Activities

This process step shows you how to confirm assembly activities via APP Confirm Production Operation (F3069)

 

2.6  Post Goods Receipt for Production Order

This process step shows you how to post the goods receipt for the production order via APP Post Goods Receipt for Production Order (F3110)

 

3.     Create Delivery

APP Create Outbound Deliveries - From Sales Orders (F0869A) to create outbound delivery

 

After clicking Create Deliveries, outbound delivery order 80030505 was created as shown in the Monitor Value Chain APP.

 

4.     Perform Picking and Post Goods Issue

APP Manage Outbound Deliveries - VL06O (VL06O_CLOUD)

 

5.     Confirm Transfer of Control Dates

Confirm internal transfer of control dates. Normally the transfer of control dates is confirmed by API or TM integration based on Incoterms

 

6.     Create Intercompany Invoice

APP Create Billing Documents (F0798)

Choose billing type Intercompany Invoice (IV2) and maintain billing date

 

7.     Create F2 Invoice

Choose billing type Invoice (F2) and maintain the billing date

 

CBC Business Configuration

7DM is disabled for the standard document types and item categories by pre-delivered configurations. The pre-delivered configurations must be enabled through an expert configuration request by raising incident using the component XX-S4C-OPR-SRV. Please state explicitly you want to activate 7DM (don't mix up with 5D2 activation process in the incident or the operation team wont proceed correctly). Providing the combination of Sales Document Types and Item Categories:

 

Also please request assigning Transit Plant 1710  to Company Code 1710 in our case.

Business Partner Master Data configuration

Please refer to 5D2 and 5HP setup guide or my previous blog post 1P9 and 5HP in Chinese. Translation via Chrome can be automatically done. In future, I might also provide corresponding English blogs for intercompany series if needed.

Product Master Data configuration

Please make sure Strategy Group: Make-to-order for configurable material (25) in the delivery plant

 

Please make sure the product is configurable.

 

The features covered in this article are based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2502, please refer to the latest information for changes in subsequent versions.

Hope you LIKE it if it addresses your issue. After that, please feel free to comment after following my account and I will reply ASAP.

More:

SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Logistics FAQ

entry.title: Advanced Intercompany Sales MTO and Variant Configuration (7DM) in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
This blog will delve into the Advanced Intercompany Sales MTO and Variant Configuration in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, scope item 7DM, revealing best practice processes and key configuration information.

This scope item enables Make-to-Order Production with Advanced Variant Configuration in advanced intercompany sales. It partially combines those functions and requires the following scope items as business conditions:

IYT - Make-to-Order Production with Variant Configuration

BJE - Make-to-Order Production - Finished Goods Sales and Final Assembly

5D2 - Advanced Intercompany Sales

I will name it as 5D2+MTO+AVC in short to distinguish between difference scenario combinations in certain extended discussions. Please note, this scope item is introduced since 2502 Edition and in Public Cloud only. The initial county content available now is US and DE.

Index

Business Process Overview

CBC Business Configuration

Business Partner Master Data configuration

Product Master Data configuration

 

Business Process Overview

In our show case, the direction is opposite to that in the best practice scope item 7DM. US company (e.g. company code 1710) sells goods to customer, and the goods are delivered from a plant, which belongs to DE company (e.g. company code 1110).

1.     Create Sales Order with Configurable Material (Single Level)

In APP Manage Sales Orders (F1873) , once the plant 1010 is entered in item 10, this sales order is considered as advanced intercompany sales.

Please note the combination of OR+CBTC and transit plant 1710 need to be attached when submitting incident requesting expert configuration to enable 7DM scope item in component XX-S4C-OPR-SRV.

Usually, the variant configuration screen will pop up and you have all the options to select.

After saving, you can find the external customer sales order 54310 appear in APP Monitor Value Chains (F4854) . Expand the sales order by clicking the arrow, we can see the intercompany sales order and purchase order has been created automatically.

 

2.     Manufacturing Steps Production Order Processing

There is no stock for SO 54310 if we check the stock report. To produce the material and get it into Sales Order stock, let’s execute the following manufacturing steps.

2.1  Material Requirements Planning for Sales Order

Find the SO in APP Monitor Material Coverage - Net / Individual Segments (F2101A) and open the manage material coverage view, click Start MRP Run. Planned order 4000002295 is created.

2.2  Create Production Order

After converting, production order 1005703 has been created.

2.3  Release Production Orders

APP Manage Production Orders (F2336)

2.4  Pick Components (Picking List)

APP Pick Components for Production Orders (CO27) to post the picking list

2.5  Confirm Assembly Activities

This process step shows you how to confirm assembly activities via APP Confirm Production Operation (F3069)

2.6  Post Goods Receipt for Production Order

This process step shows you how to post the goods receipt for the production order via APP Post Goods Receipt for Production Order (F3110)

3.     Create Delivery

APP Create Outbound Deliveries - From Sales Orders (F0869A) to create outbound delivery

After clicking Create Deliveries, outbound delivery order 80030505 was created as shown in the Monitor Value Chain APP.

4.     Perform Picking and Post Goods Issue

APP Manage Outbound Deliveries - VL06O (VL06O_CLOUD)

5.     Confirm Transfer of Control Dates

Confirm internal transfer of control dates. Normally the transfer of control dates is confirmed by API or TM integration based on Incoterms

6.     Create Intercompany Invoice

APP Create Billing Documents (F0798)

Choose billing type Intercompany Invoice (IV2) and maintain billing date

7.     Create F2 Invoice

Choose billing type Invoice (F2) and maintain the billing date

CBC Business Configuration

7DM is disabled for the standard document types and item categories by pre-delivered configurations. The pre-delivered configurations must be enabled through an expert configuration request by raising incident using the component XX-S4C-OPR-SRV. Please state explicitly you want to activate 7DM (don't mix up with 5D2 activation process in the incident or the operation team wont proceed correctly). Providing the combination of Sales Document Types and Item Categories:

Also please request assigning Transit Plant 1710  to Company Code 1710 in our case.

Business Partner Master Data configuration

Please refer to 5D2 and 5HP setup guide or my previous blog post 1P9 and 5HP in Chinese. Translation via Chrome can be automatically done. In future, I might also provide corresponding English blogs for intercompany series if needed.

Product Master Data configuration

Please make sure Strategy Group: Make-to-order for configurable material (25) in the delivery plant

Please make sure the product is configurable.

The features covered in this article are based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2502, please refer to the latest information for changes in subsequent versions.

Hope you LIKE it if it addresses your issue. After that, please feel free to comment after following my account and I will reply ASAP.

More:

SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Logistics FAQ
